name: 政府広報オンライン (Government of Japan Public Relations Online)
comment: World-scope registry (ADR-2607197800, 2026-07-19). Replaces the old R0 fictional press.example.go.jp placeholder. Verified live 2026-07-19 via direct HTTP fetch: 200 OK, content-type application/rdf+xml, real RSS 1.0/RDF channel (title 政府広報オンライン, dc:creator 内閣府大臣官房政府広報室), dc:date matching the fetch day.

name: 官報 (Official Gazette of Japan)
comment: World-scope registry (ADR-2607197800, 2026-07-19). Replaces the old R0 fictional kanpou.example.go.jp placeholder with the REAL official gazette site (opened 2025-04-01 by the Cabinet Office, superseding the old npb.go.jp portal) -- confirmed live (HTTP 200) but this is the homepage, NOT a feed. Checked 2026-07-19 for a machine-readable feed at /feed, /feed.xml, /rss, /rss.xml, /rss/index.rdf -- all 404, none found. Best-effort, UNVERIFIED feed -- needs confirmation of a real feed/API (or a page-scrape ingest path) before PublicInfoGovernor treats it as live.

comment: World-scope registry (ADR-2607197800, 2026-07-19). Verified live 2026-07-19 via direct HTTP fetch: 200 OK, XML content, real RSS 2.0 feed with current (July 2026) dated items. gouvernement.fr itself has no confirmed single central RSS feed as of this check (only scattered per-ministry feeds), so the Présidence's own feed was used for France instead -- an honest substitution, not the exact suggested host.
